mnemonics.title: ARIES Phases
mnemonics.content: Always Recover Data Using Analysis, Redo, Undo (ARU)

mnemonics.title: WAL Protocol
mnemonics.content: Write Ahead Like a cautious chef - prepare logs before serving data

visualTips.visualization: Imagine camera snapshots of database state at intervals
Visualize as a flight recorder tracking every database operation

analogies.analogy: Like having a draft copy (shadow) and final copy (current) of document
Replaying a sports match from recorded highlights to reach current state
